ops.text:
PRE-REGISTERED PROTOCOL (E17, cap $5)

Question: Can the 30-row watcher-fires golden packet calibrate the triage/warrant judge? Estimate the judge's TPR/FPR against the packet's gold labels, then apply the Noisy-but-Valid (arXiv:2601.20913) Rogan-Gladen prevalence correction to ask how wide the corrected-prevalence CIs are at pipeline scale given only n=30 calibration.

Data found:
- Golden packet: ~/.cc-steer/experiments/_base-20260719/eval/golden/watcher-fires/ (30 rows: packet.md, fires.jsonl row_id->context, manifest.json strata, labels_template.json ALL null, README blindness protocol).
- labels.json (human gold) does NOT exist yet — task cc17e0c comment 2026-07-19 confirms "packet AUTHORED — awaiting human labeling session." => GOLD PROXY = manifest.json design-intent strata (15 warranted / 15 negative from the warrant audit). Flagged as a proxy, not the human labels.
- No stored triage-judge votes anywhere (no athome VoteCache under eval/; probs/v002-*.json is the watcher LOCAL-model fire prob, a different axis — all 30 rows < 0.9999 fire threshold). => fresh vote pass required.

Method:
1. Reproduce the real judge path (cc_steer/retrain/judged.py panel_labels): per row, athome pairwise_vote at opus (backend=claude, tier=large, generator_family=qwen cross-family), prompt = build_prompt([STEER]||ctx vs [STAY_SILENT]||ctx), position-debias coin(row_id, JUDGE_SEED=1729), cache=None (E8: no shared cache). WIN=>predict warranted, TIE/LOSS=>not.
2. TPR = P(pred warranted | stratum=warranted) over 15; FPR = P(pred warranted | stratum=negative) over 15. Wilson + Clopper-Pearson 95% CIs (n=15 each).
3. Noisy-but-Valid: Rogan-Gladen pi_hat=(p_obs-FPR)/(TPR-FPR); propagate n=30 binomial uncertainty in TPR,FPR (+ pipeline sampling of p_obs) to corrected-prevalence CI half-widths across pipeline N (delta method + parametric bootstrap). Floor of CI width as N->inf is set purely by n=30.
4. Sufficiency verdict; if insufficient, sizing memo (target n for useful CI width + sampling plan) attached as COMMENT on task cc17e0c.

Success criterion: report {tpr, fpr, ci_widths, n30_sufficient, memo_attached} with defensible CIs; memo delivered if n=30 fails a pre-set usefulness bar (corrected-prevalence 95% CI half-width <= 0.10 at pipeline scale). Spend logged from usage envelopes.
